prompt: I need to create a quick memo on our incident response procedures for the team. Should be a 1-pager covering what to do when an incident is reported, escalation paths, and who to notify. Keep it concise and scannable.

assertions.name: Memo format
assertions.description: Output is formatted as a memo with clear structure (e.g., title, sections)

assertions.name: One-pager length
assertions.description: Content is concise enough to fit on one page (under 500 words)

assertions.name: Covers all required topics
assertions.description: Includes: incident definition, immediate response steps, escalation procedures, key contacts

assertions.name: Scannable formatting
assertions.description: Uses short sentences, bullets, and white space for easy scanning
